# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

- About Us
- Alumni Directory
- Institute Medalist
- Contact Us

Established in 2020, with its first convocation, IIT Jammu Alumni Affairs Council aims to maintain and strengthen the long-term connection between IIT Jammu and its Alumni. The Alumni Affairs Council along with the extremely dedicated Deans, Director, and Coordinator/FIC will bridge the gap and build strong connections between the Institute and the Alumni. In the coming years, along with Alumni Reunions, we will be planning and executing many events and causes which in a way will help Alumni as well as the Institution to establish fruitful engagements.

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

### Dean Message

The Office of Alumni Affairs is dedicated to strengthening and enriching the relationship between IIT Jammu and its alumni. This relationship will be a foundation for organizing various outreach activities, such as **Alumni Reunion**, **Campaign for New Resources to Create Scholarship for Students**, **Creating Faculty Chairs**, and a **Distinguished Lecture Series**, amongst others. We plan to fix an **Alumni Day** as a way of celebrating the achievements of all alumni in various fields of life, and drawing from these achievements inspiration for furthering the progress of IIT Jammu in innovative directions.

##### Dr Ankit Kathuria
Dean | Alumni Affairs Office

### Associate Dean Message

We are delighted to engage with our alumni community through this office. As of 2024, we proudly support five cohorts of alumni from this growing institution. Our goal is to ensure that the Institute’s support is accessible to every IIT Jammu alumnus. We share a strong bond with our alumni, and this office serves as a comprehensive support center for them. We are committed to continually enhancing our capacity to improve alumni support and interactions, fostering a strong connection in the coming years

##### Dr Ankur Bansal
Associate Dean | Alumni Affairs Office

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

**Mr. Harshdev Singh (2018UEE0097)

B.Tech Electrical Engineering

Batch 2018-2022**

Mr. Harshdev Singh, B.Tech Electrical Engineering Batch 2018-2022, received the Best New Initiative Award which was sponsored by the Alumni of IIT Jammu on 16th October 2022. More than 20 applications were received from various students and around 8 were shortlisted. After transparent screening by the committee comprised of members of the Alumni Affairs Office, Dean Alumni Affairs, Faculty Members and Alumni of IIT Jammu. The committee decided to award Mr. Harshdev Singh with the ‘Best New Inititative’.

Mr. Harshdev Singh took an initiative to strengthen the robotics and coding clubs of the institute. He took responsibility in engaging and training the current students and organized various workshops on Web and Game Development under which around 200+ students participated and learned the basic and advanced concepts of Game Development. During his term at IIT Jammu, he also represented IIT Jammu at Inter IIT Sports meet in 2018 (Guwahati) and 2019 (Kharagpur) in cricket and football. He also won the title of ‘Mr. Pravaah’ in 2020 and ‘Mr. Convoquer in 2020. After graduating from IIT Jammu, he decided to launch his own organization by the name of ‘Rigel Next Games’ and working as a Co-Founder & CEO.

Alumni Team wishes him all the best and success!

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

**Mr. Lakshya Devani

B.Tech Electrical Engineering

Batch 2019-2023**

A renowned honour given by IIT Jammu

The "Best Initiative Award" recognises exceptional efforts and innovations made by individuals within the IIT Jammu community. This honour demonstrates the university's dedication to fostering social responsibility, leadership, and creativity in its faculty, staff, and students.

The "Best Initiative Award" recognizes a initiative taken by a student that is novel, impact the community in and around IIT Jammu and is proven to be sustainable

We proudly announce that this year Lakshya Devani, B.Tech Electrical Engineering Batch 2019-2023, won the Best New Initiative Award 2023 on 21st October 2023 because of his contribution in MESH. MESH - MESH of Engineering Science and Humanities is a forum which promotes Interdisciplinary Thinking. Interdisciplinary Thinking is an attempt to re-think the boundaries between engineering, medicine, basic sciences, humanities and in general all aspects of human knowledge. For the last two years Lakshya Devani was the convenor of MESH which was successfully able to organise 50+ sessions including fests like Udyamitav and National level completions and also hosted flagship events like management of EBSB Yuva Sangam. MESH is now present in 4 institutes and many schools of Jammu region. Along with this he was able to manage a decent CGPA of 8.3, and won third prize for IIT Jammu in inter IIT Tech Fest.

Best wishes from Alumni Affairs Council
